channel.title: Weeklypedia
channel.description: The most edited Wikipedia articles and discussions from the last week

item.title: Weeklypedia - June 5, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,613 authors made 758,913 changes to 400,049 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Murder of Henry Nowak (621 changes by 131 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (570 changes by 99 authors)
  3. Backrooms (film) (417 changes by 129 authors)
  4. 2026 NCAA Division I baseball tournament (383 changes by 36 authors)
  5. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections in California (379 changes by 33 authors)
  6. Bricks & Minifigs (377 changes by 87 authors)
  7. 2026 French Open – Men's singles (374 changes by 91 authors)
  8. Obsession (2025 film) (319 changes by 115 authors)
  9. Portugal (297 changes by 4 authors)
  10. Lazăr Sfera (287 changes by 3 authors)
  11. Dam (287 changes by 9 authors)
  12. 2026 FIFA World Cup squads (282 changes by 50 authors)
  13. List of songs produced by Dallas Austin (272 changes by 4 authors)
  14. 2026 French Open – Women's singles (271 changes by 64 authors)
  15. 2026 Indonesia Open (235 changes by 25 authors)
  16. Hate That I Made You Love Me (224 changes by 48 authors)
  17. Robert Cummings (actor, born 1865) (217 changes by 2 authors)
  18. Magnifica Humanitas (212 changes by 99 authors)
  19. Maja Chwalińska (212 changes by 50 authors)
  20. Jñānagarbha (211 changes by 4 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Robert Cummings (actor, born 1865) (218 changes by 2 authors)
  2. John Brainerd (missionary) (159 changes by 6 authors)
  3. I Knew It, I Knew You (157 changes by 30 authors)
  4. 2026 Bakersfield bank incident (108 changes by 11 authors)
  5. 2026 Birmingham Open – Women's singles (85 changes by 11 authors)
  6. 2026 Namhkam Township explosion (76 changes by 37 authors)
  7. Zach Lahn (69 changes by 13 authors)
  8. Cooper Tomlinson (67 changes by 11 authors)
  9. 2025 Pan American Field Archery Championships (65 changes by 1 authors)
  10. Television broadcasts of the 1952 Democratic and Republican National Conventions (65 changes by 2 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Murder of Henry Nowak
  2. Restore Britain
  3. 2026 Central Africa Ebola epidemic
  4. Magnifica Humanitas
  5. Bricks & Minifigs

item.title: Weeklypedia - May 29, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 72,887 authors made 754,554 changes to 394,485 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Unitary executive theory (701 changes by 3 authors)
  2. 2026 French Open – Men's singles (627 changes by 74 authors)
  3. Deaths in 2026 (551 changes by 91 authors)
  4. Atlas Delmenhorst (523 changes by 1 authors)
  5. Garden Grove chemical leak (499 changes by 67 authors)
  6. 2026 French Open – Women's singles (388 changes by 43 authors)
  7. Dam (317 changes by 5 authors)
  8. List of Sigma Tau Delta chapters (292 changes by 2 authors)
  9. Backrooms (film) (268 changes by 91 authors)
  10. Sonny Rollins (264 changes by 69 authors)
  11. 2026 Singapore Open (badminton) (262 changes by 23 authors)
  12. Tartu JK Tammeka U21 (259 changes by 1 authors)
  13. Portugal (258 changes by 7 authors)
  14. May 2026 White House shooting (257 changes by 62 authors)
  15. Nagykozár (242 changes by 1 authors)
  16. 2026 Ituri Province Ebola epidemic (239 changes by 75 authors)
  17. 2026 Makerfield by-election (238 changes by 51 authors)
  18. Grosse Fuge (231 changes by 4 authors)
  19. 2026 NCAA Division I baseball tournament (230 changes by 29 authors)
  20. 2026 Iran war (223 changes by 25 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Garden Grove gas leak (500 changes by 68 authors)
  2. List of Sigma Tau Delta chapters (293 changes by 2 authors)
  3. May 2026 White House shooting (258 changes by 62 authors)
  4. 2026 Quetta bombing (154 changes by 56 authors)
  5. 2026 Liushenyu coal mine explosion (138 changes by 63 authors)
  6. Killing of Henry Nowak (129 changes by 41 authors)
  7. Nocardia seriolae (122 changes by 5 authors)
  8. Nippon Dynawave Packaging facility incident (112 changes by 40 authors)
  9. Patricia Welles (103 changes by 2 authors)
  10. James Oddie (103 changes by 3 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Jordan Lasker
  2. Main Page
  3. List of people from Palestine (historical region)
  4. United States
  5. Nick Shirley

item.title: Weeklypedia - May 22, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 75,241 authors made 848,758 changes to 460,438 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Islamic Center of San Diego shooting (920 changes by 198 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (463 changes by 76 authors)
  3. Dam (458 changes by 7 authors)
  4. 2026 Makerfield by-election (452 changes by 121 authors)
  5. Joyce Castle (412 changes by 8 authors)
  6. Glossary of chess (385 changes by 4 authors)
  7. Eurovision Song Contest 2027 (372 changes by 116 authors)
  8. 2026 FIFA World Cup squads (365 changes by 73 authors)
  9. Cockroach Janta Party (336 changes by 91 authors)
  10. Felicity Lott (320 changes by 47 authors)
  11. Portugal (300 changes by 10 authors)
  12. Obsession (2025 film) (284 changes by 85 authors)
  13. 2026 Malaysia Masters (270 changes by 23 authors)
  14. 2026 Ituri Province Ebola outbreak (233 changes by 79 authors)
  15. 2026 French Open – Men's singles qualifying (231 changes by 20 authors)
  16. Gameoverse (220 changes by 64 authors)
  17. 2025–26 Premier League (219 changes by 84 authors)
  18. Nagykozár (211 changes by 3 authors)
  19. 2026 French Open – Women's singles qualifying (209 changes by 13 authors)
  20. Eurovision Song Contest 2026 (207 changes by 62 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 San Diego shooting (921 changes by 198 authors)
  2. Cockroach Janta Party (337 changes by 91 authors)
  3. 2026 Ituri Province ebola outbreak (234 changes by 79 authors)
  4. 2026 Modena car-ramming attack (175 changes by 25 authors)
  5. Chud The Builder (173 changes by 44 authors)
  6. 2026 Hamburg Open – Men's singles (151 changes by 15 authors)
  7. Athiradi (2026 film) (134 changes by 44 authors)
  8. 2026 Thinwana Kandu cave diving incident (118 changes by 11 authors)
  9. 2026 Geneva Open – Singles (112 changes by 12 authors)
  10. Mohammed Owda (103 changes by 14 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Jordan Lasker
  2. Earthquake light
  3. 2026 Islamic Center of San Diego shooting
  4. List of people from Palestine (historical region)
  5. 2026 Iran war

item.title: Weeklypedia - May 15, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,868 authors made 749,598 changes to 366,685 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak (714 changes by 209 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (507 changes by 85 authors)
  3. 2026 Scottish Parliament election (431 changes by 102 authors)
  4. 2026 United Kingdom local elections (365 changes by 136 authors)
  5. Dam (355 changes by 7 authors)
  6. 2026 Canvas security incident (353 changes by 148 authors)
  7. 2026 Thailand Open (badminton) (303 changes by 18 authors)
  8. 2026 Italian Open – Men's singles (266 changes by 35 authors)
  9. C. Joseph Vijay (266 changes by 64 authors)
  10. 2026 Baoji China Masters (265 changes by 14 authors)
  11. 2026 Senedd election (239 changes by 83 authors)
  12. 2026 Birmingham City Council election (229 changes by 24 authors)
  13. Skrilla (226 changes by 10 authors)
  14. Suvendu Adhikari (218 changes by 79 authors)
  15. Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu (213 changes by 81 authors)
  16. Brandon Clarke (211 changes by 101 authors)
  17. Andes virus (210 changes by 45 authors)
  18. 2026 FIFA World Cup squads (210 changes by 50 authors)
  19. History of England (202 changes by 1 authors)
  20. Tench Coxe (201 changes by 7 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 United Kingdom government crisis (199 changes by 67 authors)
  2. UFO Files (government documents) (182 changes by 19 authors)
  3. Q Manivannan (178 changes by 64 authors)
  4. Trial of the 66 (175 changes by 3 authors)
  5. 2026 Philippine senate lockdown (161 changes by 43 authors)
  6. 2026 state visit by Donald Trump to China (147 changes by 39 authors)
  7. Queen's Latin (144 changes by 4 authors)
  8. 7th Scottish Parliament (141 changes by 20 authors)
  9. Suvendu Adhikari ministry (126 changes by 43 authors)
  10. 2026 Makerfield by-election (109 changes by 44 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak
  2. Persecution of transgender people under the second Trump administration
  3. 1993 Michael Jackson sexual abuse allegations
  4. Republican Party (United States)
  5. Donald Trump

item.title: Weeklypedia - May 8, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,322 authors made 740,749 changes to 370,594 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 West Bengal Legislative Assembly election (756 changes by 104 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (515 changes by 87 authors)
  3. 2026 Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly election (507 changes by 56 authors)

  18. The Devil Wears Prada 2 (214 changes by 70 authors)
  19. 2026 Assam Legislative Assembly election (208 changes by 55 authors)
  20. 2026 AFC U-17 Women's Asian Cup (203 changes by 20 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. MV hondius Hantavirus outbreak (394 changes by 166 authors)
  2. Gary (The Bear) (151 changes by 16 authors)
  3. Zossen documents (142 changes by 5 authors)
  4. White House security incident (134 changes by 21 authors)
  5. Star Fox (2026 video game) (125 changes by 54 authors)
  6. 2026 Leipzig car attack (124 changes by 29 authors)
  7. Operation Project Freedom (121 changes by 30 authors)
  8. Israel Evans: (chaplain) (114 changes by 2 authors)
  9. MV Hondius (109 changes by 39 authors)
  10. List of Chinese counties by GDP (107 changes by 4 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Zionism
  2. Persecution of transgender people under the second Trump administration
  3. List of Palestinians
  4. Republican Party (United States)
  5. Reform UK

item.title: Weeklypedia - May 1, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,362 authors made 772,537 changes to 409,751 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 White House Correspondents' dinner (989 changes by 202 authors)

  1. 2026 White House Correspondents' dinner (990 changes by 202 authors)
  2. 2026 Mali attacks (690 changes by 86 authors)
  3. 2026 Bekasi train crash (207 changes by 94 authors)
  4. List of memorials related to the Wackersdorf reprocessing plant (140 changes by 8 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 White House Correspondents' dinner
  2. Mahathir Mohamad
  3. Zionism
  4. Republican Party (United States)
  5. Missing scientists conspiracy theory

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 24, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,011 authors made 829,847 changes to 469,844 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Bulgarian parliamentary election (550 changes by 111 authors)
  2. WrestleMania 42 (547 changes by 167 authors)
  3. Deaths in 2026 (507 changes by 83 authors)
  4. Bigg Boss Marathi season 6 (463 changes by 232 authors)

  17. 2026 Iran war (222 changes by 43 authors)
  18. Portugal (220 changes by 6 authors)
  19. List of Kappa Alpha Psi chapters (219 changes by 10 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Shreveport shooting (429 changes by 78 authors)
  2. 2026 Kyiv shooting (201 changes by 37 authors)
  3. 2026 Teotihuacan pyramids shooting (172 changes by 50 authors)
  4. Missing scientists conspiracy theory (161 changes by 23 authors)

  6. Ellis Stratakos (123 changes by 4 authors)
  7. 1926 Irish Free State census (101 changes by 3 authors)

  9. 2026 Brisbane Broncos season (92 changes by 5 authors)
  10. 2026 Oeiras CETO Open – Singles (87 changes by 8 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Zionism
  2. 2026 Iran war
  3. Redeemed Christian Church of God
  4. Donald Trump
  5. Southern Poverty Law Center

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 17, 2026
item.description:
Articles

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 10, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 71,683 authors made 786,149 changes to 415,303 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 3, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,829 authors made 775,080 changes to 417,966 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Deaths in 2026 (594 changes by 88 authors)
  2. 2026 No Kings protests (582 changes by 133 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Credit One Charleston Open – Singles (229 changes by 25 authors)
  2. 2026 Copa Colsanitas – Singles (134 changes by 29 authors)
  3. TOI-1853 b (118 changes by 5 authors)

  6. Pere (name) (109 changes by 3 authors)
  7. Edinburgh plague of 1585 (103 changes by 3 authors)
  8. 2022–23 World Rugby Sevens Series squads (93 changes by 3 authors)
  9. 2026 Grand Prix Hassan II – Singles (85 changes by 17 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Donald Trump
  2. 2026 Iran war
  3. Zionism
